recent_excerpts: Specops Software documents how helpdesk social engineering turns password reset requests into full account compromise — attackers bypass MFA and gain persistent access.
A trojanized Slack installer delivers a remote access tool that creates a hidden desktop, allowing attackers to bypass multi-factor authentication and silently control victim machines.
